title: Platform Descriptor
description: A registered platform in the platform-descriptor registry (§12.6). Adding a platform is one descriptor + one packager template + one gate module + an adapter binding. v1 ships six descriptors (the RD-7 set, including the TikTok manual descriptor). Spec ref: release-spec.md §12.6.

schema_version.description: Descriptor shape version, for migration handling (§11.1).

id.description: Canonical platform id, referenced by brand.json platforms[].platform and by calendar slots.

aliases.description: Alternate names that resolve to this descriptor (e.g. 'x', 'twitter/x').

workflow_class.description: Which of the two lanes this platform routes through. TEXT_HEAVY drafts first; VISUAL_HEAVY sources media first.

packager_contract_ref.description: Repo-relative reference to the packager template/contract for this platform's final formatting.

gates_ref.description: Repo-relative reference to the per-platform deterministic gate module/rules.

publisher.description: Which publisher adapter carries this platform. 'manual' marks a documented manual-only path (e.g. the TikTok descriptor in v1).

support_status.description: Release support tier for this platform lane.

limits.description: Platform packaging/publishing limits enforced by the per-platform gate. All fields optional; absent means no declared limit on that dimension.

max_media_items.description: Maximum number of media attachments per post.

media_types.description: Accepted media MIME-class tokens (e.g. image, video, gif).

max_media_mb.description: Maximum media file size in megabytes.

repo_ref_or_null.description: A repo-relative path/reference, or null when not applicable. Absolute paths and drive letters are forbidden.
